summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Excel/CSV Analyzer feature with Gemini AI integration. All backend APIs (7/7 tests) passed. Frontend UI fully functional - file upload, preview table, quick questions, and AI responses all working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (span inside tr/tbody/th/td) - these are React development warnings from the preview environment, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analyzer/upload - CSV file upload with preview data
Backend: POST /api/analyzer/upload - Invalid file type rejection (400)
Backend: POST /api/analyzer/ask - Question about uploaded data with Gemini AI response
Backend: GET /api/analyzer/session/{id} - Get session info and history
Backend: DELETE /api/analyzer/session/{id} - Delete session and verify removal
Frontend: Navigation to /analyzer via sidebar link 'Анализ Excel'
Frontend: Excel/CSV Analyzer page loads with Gemini AI badge
Frontend: Upload button visible and functional
Frontend: CSV file upload displays file info (name, rows, columns)
Frontend: Preview table shows column headers and data rows
Frontend: Quick questions section displays preset questions in Russian
Frontend: Question input field accepts user input
Frontend: Send button triggers API call
Frontend: Gemini AI response displayed with proper formatting
Frontend: AI response includes calculation details and final answer
seed_data_creation: Test CSV files created dynamically during testing and cleaned up via session deletion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel/CSV Analyzer feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: /api/analyzer/upload (file upload), /api/analyzer/ask (question with Gemini AI), /api/analyzer/session/{id} (get/delete session). Frontend page at /analyzer displays file preview table, quick questions, and chat-style Q&A with Gemini AI. All CRUD operations work correctly. Gemini AI integration via emergentintegrations.llm.chat is functional.
